docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANALES, CLAUDIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY CANALES, CLAUDIA CHAVEZ, MARTHA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2016 BY DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CLAUDIA CANALES & DEFENDANT MARTHA CHAVEZ. PARTIES SIGNED STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY CANALES, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANALES, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARTHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARTHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANALES, CLAUDIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, MARTHA MS. CANALES DID NOT ESTABLISH BY A PROPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT SHE PAID A DEPOSIT TO MASTER TENANT MS. CHAVEZ, RATHER THAN RENT FOR MAY AND JUNE TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
